quality.mechanics_soundness: sound - standard arcane utility spell mechanics.

key_mechanics: Unlimited range (with 5% failure chance if target is on another plane)
Instantaneous mental communication (one round response time)

analysis.archivist_notes: The spell 'Sending' is a well-defined, highly useful communication utility spell. Mechanics are straightforward and consistent with established D&D 5e conventions for range and planar communication limitations.
